entries.name: A Gilded Cage
entries.description: On a quest to discover the fates of three knights of the House of Secrets, the Leyfarers stumble upon an an ancient laboratory. Within these arcane walls they find secrets of the past, and a secret weapon of the Ashbringer. CR 3-12 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Minor Body Horror, Claustrophobia, References to Mental Illness, Moral Choices Roleplay: ★★★☆☆ Mystery: ★★☆☆☆ Combat: ★★★☆☆ Puzzles: ★★★☆☆ Lore: ★★★★☆ Author: Rowan Spiers-Floyd Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: All That Glitters
entries.description: We know what it takes to be a Leyfarer, but do you have what it takes to be the BEST Leyfarer? Test your competitive skill alongside other Leyfarer bands to out-run, out-battle, and out-save-the-day to take home the gold. CR 3-14 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Author: Juniper Spencer Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: Ballad of the Road
entries.description: The Calamity Kids need the Leyfarer’s help on their world tour! Guide them through the dangerous roads of Val’Ruvina and maybe make sure they don’t quit the band? CR 3-12 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Implied Intoxication, Moral Choices, Toxic Relationships, Potty Humor, Creative Swearing, Normal Swearing, Fantasy Crime Roleplay: ★★★★☆ Mystery: ★☆☆☆☆ Combat: ★★★☆☆ Puzzles: ★★★★☆ Lore: ★★☆☆☆ Author: Juniper Spencer Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! entries.name: Beneath the Briars
entries.description: The Leyfarer’s must revisit the ruins of Briar’s End, and confront the ghosts of the past with the help of the new Green Witch. CR 3-11 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. entries.name: Dead Man’s Quest
entries.description: Scour the coastline of an unknown shore, searching for the legendary lost treasure of a dreaded corsair. Will you be the first to uncover what time and tide have buried, or will fell spirits drawn to age old greed find you first? CR 3-14 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: TBD Author: Max Hobbs Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: Earthsong Horizon
entries.description: The Leyfarers return to the Red Mesa to aid the Ra’Khahri in a great hunt, to reunite with their lost fourth clan. CR 3-11 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. entries.name: Field Testing
entries.description: Help Wanted! "Research Assistants" wanted for cutting edge experimental magic item testing. Tests "may" have risks. -Dr. Contravance CR 3-12 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. entries.name: Fight the Moon
entries.description: As submitted and voted upon by the Leyfarer community, this Player's Choice Side Quest dares to ask: What did the moon ever give us? More werewolves? Pffft. Someone needs to show it who's boss. It's time to fight the moon. CR 3-11 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Hubris, Audacity, Consequences, Getting Exactly What You Voted For, Puzzles Roleplay: ★★★☆☆ Mystery: ★★☆☆☆ Combat: ★★★★☆ Puzzles: ★★☆☆☆ Lore: ★★★☆☆ Author: Dana Ebert Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! entries.name: Jurassic Kart
entries.description: No one knows how the Leyfarers got to Volconia, but what awaits them is high speed prehistoric vehicular chaos. CR 3-12 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. entries.name: Networks of the Past
entries.description: Vesic has undergone a great change, and with this shift of power the time has come for the new occupants to uncover more of the deepest passages below the city, and help to map them out with the help of the Leyfarers. CR 3-14 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. entries.name: Once Upon A Winter Fire
entries.description: As the shortest day of the year fast approaches, the Leyfarers aid a village in preparations for the yearly holiday. But they may have bitten off more than they can chew. Will the spirit of the season draw them closer together or pull them apart? CR 3-13 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Hypothermia, Moral Choices, Animal Sacrifice, Insects, Mini Games, Puzzles Roleplay: ★★★☆☆ Mystery: ★★★☆☆ Combat: ★★★☆☆ Puzzles: ★★★★☆ Lore: ★★☆☆☆ Author: Rowan Spiers-Floyd Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! entries.name: Quartet of Damnation
entries.description: The infernal apple doesn’t fall far from the tree, and when the seed of a past evil comes to settle a score, the Leyfarers find themselves at the mercy of some fiendish teens. CR 3-14 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Unusual Combat Mechanics, Insults, Trickery, Paternal Guilt Roleplay: ★★☆☆☆ Mystery: ★★☆☆☆ Combat: ★★★★★ Puzzles: ★★★☆☆ Lore: ★★☆☆☆ Author: Law Johnson Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! entries.name: Revenge of the Gnerds
entries.description: Enter the Chronicle for this ReQuest from the time of Karsanic University. Travel back to when magic was whole, possibility gleamed on the horizon, and KU’s Erebosi Row threw the fanciest dance the University has ever seen. That is, unless the GNERDs have something to say about it. CR 3-14 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: College Humor, Dancing, Teen Alienation Roleplay: ★★★★★ Mystery: ★★★☆☆ Combat: ★★☆☆☆ Puzzles: ★★☆☆☆ Lore: ★☆☆☆☆ Author: Sage Ricci Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! entries.name: Rumors of Sunlight and Ash
entries.description: It has recently come to light that the constructs being prepared for Vesic's upcoming race are being tampered with, and the culprit appears to be targeting the most destructive entries. The adventurers have been brought in to investigate quietly by the race coordinators, and to take care of the saboteurs before the race begins.

entries.name: Secrets of the Golden City
entries.description: The heroes’ goal is simple: infiltrate the fey city of Dayspring, assess the city's current situation while avoiding encounters with the Ashbringer's forces, find a way into the Sunlit Citadel, and report back to the Nightmark Network.

entries.name: Shipping Wars
entries.description: Is magic in the air, or is it something more potent? There are reports from all around Fort Folio of people falling dramatically into cliche relationships. Kissing and everything! Someone better put a stop to this before it gets out of hand. CR 3-13 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Kissing, Fantasy Relationships Roleplay: ★★★★★ Mystery: ★★★☆☆ Combat: ★★☆☆☆ Puzzles: ★★☆☆☆ Lore: ★★☆☆☆ Author: Isaac Davies Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: Sirens of the Jungle
entries.description: The depths of the Nayari Jungle hide many things. Ancient ruins, strange creatures, possible truths. When the Leyfarers meet a new friend in peril, his troubles quickly become their own, in new and distorting ways... CR 3-11 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Coercion, Hallucinations, Mental Instability, Feet, Snakes, Spiders, Intoxication Roleplay: ★★★☆☆ Mystery: ★★★★☆ Combat: ★★★☆☆ Puzzles: ★★☆☆☆ Lore: ★★★☆☆ Author: Kristina Sisto Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: The Blooms That Feed on Fire
entries.description: After hearing rumors for several months, members of the Nightmark Network have confirmed that the Ashbringer is preparing to perform a ritual of her own design—one that may very well spell the end of the world. With mere hours remaining until the Ashbringer performs her ritual, the heroes must infiltrate the Sunlit Citadel, ascend to the highest floor, and face her for perhaps the last time.

entries.name: The Bridge of Dreams
entries.description: The Leyfarers must return to the Dreamwild to help Shayde connect The Green Fort to New Briar's End using the help of a long forgotten song of the fey. CR 3 Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Violence Roleplay: ★★☆☆☆ Mystery: ★★★☆☆ Combat: ★★★★☆ Puzzles: ★★★☆☆ Lore: ★★★★☆ Author: Law Johnson Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: The Lost Tome of Horn Mountain
The Thinning Veil
entries.description: The Leyfarers help escort the newly formed Veiled Court through the challenges of a wild and unfamiliar landscape and an unknown destiny. Along the way, they help a strange new friend navigate the growing pains of their awakening. As the veil frays and old boundaries blur, the Leyfarers must decide what it means to belong, and what must be surrendered, as the world begins to change. CR 3-13 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Confusion, Chaos, Forced Eating, Traumatic Plurality, Stage Fright, Described Suffering Roleplay: ★★★★★ Mystery: ★★★★☆ Combat: ★★★☆☆ Puzzles: ★☆☆☆☆ Lore: ★★☆☆☆ Author: Sage Ricci Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: Trine
entries.description: Trine: Warriors of the Mana Grid: Trapped inside the Weave itself, the Leyfarers discover an enigmatic world of living spells, neon architecture, and pulsing aetherwave, where none of the rules of their former reality seem to apply. Separated from their skills and abilities, can the Leyfarers master the mysterious Trine on time to survive the Mana Grid's death games and find a way back to their world, or will they be permanently derezzed and deleted? Please Note: This side quest, while 5e compatible, utilizes an original rules system that replaces all of your character's skills, traits, and features in the world of the Mana Grid. Therefore, it may not deliver a traditional 5e play experience and is recommended for experienced players. CR 3-13 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. Content Warnings: Cinematic Descriptions, Death Sports, Deletion/Derezzing, Minigame Mechanics, Online Gaming Conventions, Stylized Combat Roleplay: ★★☆☆☆ Mystery: ★★☆☆☆ Combat: ★★★☆☆ Puzzles: ★☆☆☆☆ Lore: ★☆☆☆☆ Author: Dana Ebert Rewards: One session of XP for characters under the current campaign maximum, magic items, adventure, and friendship! This is a game for players 16 or older. Each booking is for one person, but you can reserve multiple slots during checkout.

entries.name: Trine: Warriors of the Mana Grid
What the Stars Silenced
entries.description: What the Stars have Silenced: In an effort to gather resources to help the Leyfarers be prepared for fiendish adversaries, an elite group must infiltrate a stronghold guarded by none other than The Children of the Fallen Star. CR 3-11 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. entries.name: What's Yours is Mine
entries.description: In a forgotten Namorian mining town, a mine cave-in tears open a shaft into the drowned aqueducts of a settlement that stood ages before the Cataclysm. The Leyfarers must navigate the broken tunnels and wild magic, outwit a predator that can strike from past or future, and escape before the mine becomes their tomb in every timeline. CR 3-12 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later. entries.name: Your True Feyce
entries.description: The pixies of the Dye, Spell, Magic Beauty salon are back with a celebration of true identity. One of their number is unveiling her true face and her friends have invited you to celebrate! Nothing will go wrong, I'm sure. CR 3-13 (Scaling) Adventure for The Leyfarer's Chronicle. Players that don't currently have a character in The Leyfarer's Chronicle are welcome to begin as a Level 3 player character following the campaign Player's Guide. Alternatively, our Game Masters can provide a selection of pre-generated characters that you can replace with a different character later.
